--- match_coverage_labels.sql
GRAPH FinGraph
-- Label Expressions
MATCH (nl1:Person|Employee)
MATCH (nl2:Person&Employee)
MATCH (nl3:!Person)
MATCH (nl4:%)
MATCH (nl5:(Person|Employee)&!Student)
MATCH (nl6 IS Person)
MATCH (nl7:Person)
RETURN *

--- AST
&ast.GQLGraphQuery{
  GraphClause: &ast.GQLGraphClause{
    PropertyGraphName: &ast.Path{
      Idents: []*ast.Ident{
        &ast.Ident{
          NamePos: 6,
          NameEnd: 14,
          Name:    "FinGraph",
        },
      },
    },
  },
  Query: &ast.GQLMultiLinearQueryStatement{
    Statements: []ast.GQLLinearQueryStatement{
      &ast.GQLSimpleLinearQueryStatement{
        Statements: []ast.GQLPrimitiveQueryStatement{
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       36,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  42,
                          Rparen:  62,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 43,
                              NameEnd: 46,
                              Name:    "nl1",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 46,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
                                Op:   "|",
                                Left: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 47,
                                    NameEnd: 53,
                                    Name:    "Person",
                                  },
                                },
                                Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 54,
                                    NameEnd: 62,
                                    Name:    "Employee",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       64,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  70,
                          Rparen:  90,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 71,
                              NameEnd: 74,
                              Name:    "nl2",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 74,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
                                Op:   "&",
                                Left: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 75,
                                    NameEnd: 81,
                                    Name:    "Person",
                                  },
                                },
                                Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 82,
                                    NameEnd: 90,
                                    Name:    "Employee",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       92,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  98,
                          Rparen:  110,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 99,
                              NameEnd: 102,
                              Name:    "nl3",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 102,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLLabelUnaryExpr{
                                OpPos: 103,
                                Op:    "!",
                                Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                  Name: &ast.Ident{
                                    NamePos: 104,
                                    NameEnd: 110,
                                    Name:    "Person",
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       112,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  118,
                          Rparen:  124,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 119,
                              NameEnd: 122,
                              Name:    "nl4",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 122,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLWildcardLabel{
                                Percent: 123,
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       126,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  132,
                          Rparen:  163,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 133,
                              NameEnd: 136,
                              Name:    "nl5",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 136,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
                                Op:   "&",
                                Left: &ast.GQLLabelParenExpr{
                                  Lparen: 137,
                                  Rparen: 153,
                                  Expr:   &ast.GQLLabelBinaryExpr{
                                    Op:   "|",
                                    Left: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                      Name: &ast.Ident{
                                        NamePos: 138,
                                        NameEnd: 144,
                                        Name:    "Person",
                                      },
                                    },
                                    Right: &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                      Name: &ast.Ident{
                                        NamePos: 145,
                                        NameEnd: 153,
                                        Name:    "Employee",
                                      },
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                                Right: &ast.GQLLabelUnaryExpr{
                                  OpPos: 155,
                                  Op:    "!",
                                  Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                    Name: &ast.Ident{
                                      NamePos: 156,
                                      NameEnd: 163,
                                      Name:    "Student",
                                    },
                                  },
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       165,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  171,
                          Rparen:  185,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 172,
                              NameEnd: 175,
                              Name:    "nl6",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    176,
                              Colon: -1,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 179,
                                  NameEnd: 185,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLMatch{
            OptionalPos: -1,
            Match:       187,
            Pattern:     &ast.GQLGraphPattern{
              Paths: []*ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                &ast.GQLTopLevelPathPattern{
                  Path: &ast.GQLPathPattern{
                    Terms: []*ast.GQLPathTerm{
                      &ast.GQLPathTerm{
                        Primary: &ast.GQLNodePattern{
                          Lparen:  193,
                          Rparen:  204,
                          Pattern: &ast.GQLElementPatternFiller{
                            EmptyPos: -1,
                            Variable: &ast.Ident{
                              NamePos: 194,
                              NameEnd: 197,
                              Name:    "nl7",
                            },
                            Label: &ast.GQLLabelFilter{
                              IS:    -1,
                              Colon: 197,
                              Expr:  &ast.GQLNameLabel{
                                Name: &ast.Ident{
                                  NamePos: 198,
                                  NameEnd: 204,
                                  Name:    "Person",
                                },
                              },
                            },
                          },
                        },
                      },
                    },
                  },
                },
              },
            },
          },
          &ast.GQLReturn{
            Return: 206,
            Items:  []*ast.GQLReturnItem{
              &ast.GQLReturnItem{
                Star: 213,
              },
            },
          },
        },
      },
    },
  },
}

--- SQL
GRAPH FinGraph MATCH (nl1:Person | Employee) MATCH (nl2:Person & Employee) MATCH (nl3:!Person) MATCH (nl4:%) MATCH (nl5:(Person | Employee) & !Student) MATCH (nl6 IS Person) MATCH (nl7:Person) RETURN *
